prompt: Value finish branch on river: choose action.
why_v1: By the river, this hand is strong enough to value bet, so checking would leave money behind from worse calls.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Checking avoids spewing, but this river is strong enough to value bet and wins more from worse calls.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This river is strong enough to value bet, so checking would leave money behind from worse calls.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Checking leaves value behind, but this river is strong enough to bet and get paid by worse hands.
